title: Using unencrypted AWS SQS queues is security sensitive
description: This rule checks for unencrypted Amazon Simple Queue Service (SQS) queues used in AWS SDK for Python.
message: AWS SQS queue is created without encryption

noncompliant.code:
import boto3
client = boto3.client('sqs')
queue = client.create_queue(QueueName='myqueue', Attributes={'EncryptionType': 'NONE'})

compliant.code:
import boto3
client = boto3.client('sqs')
queue = client.create_queue(QueueName='myqueue', Attributes={'EncryptionType': 'AES256'})

why_is_this_an_issue: Unencrypted SQS queues can be intercepted and exposed, leading to data breaches.
how_to_fix: Use encrypted SQS queues when creating or updating them.
